2_primaryJTBD.decision: Which group needs my attention for planning or member management?

primaryCTA.component: Group card click or Ny gruppe button
primaryCTA.label: View group details or create new group

items: Quick stats (total groups, players, with plans)

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: GOOD - Strong decision focus for management tool
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Group selection and creation are clear primary actions

4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Stats-first design shows overview, then enables action

kpis.note: Useful context but not directly actionable
Shows how many groups still need plans

5_kpiQuality.assessment: MODERATE - Mix of actionable and vanity metrics

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - Inline actions via dropdown menu, minimal navigation

8_stateCoverage.assessment: GOOD - Has loading and empty states with create CTA
gaps: No error handling visible (falls back to mock data on API failure)
No success confirmation after group deletion
No 'at risk' indicator for groups without training plans or upcoming sessions

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all coach levels - clear group organization

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Professional group management with good filtering and inline actions
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: Filterable group list with stats overview and dropdown menus for actions
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Filterable group list with stats overview and inline actions

topIssues.issue: Falls back to mock data on API failure (same pattern as CoachStatsOverview)
topIssues.impact: Coach sees fake groups instead of real data

topIssues.issue: No success feedback after deletion or other actions
Stats don't show trends (are groups growing? Plans improving?)

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Remove mock data fallback + add success toasts for all actions + add trend indicators to stats

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader pattern (consistent). Similar card-list layout to other coach pages. Dropdown menu pattern reused. Member avatar stacking is nice visual pattern. Modal for destructive actions (good practice).

stateHandling.empty: Empty state with icon, message, and CTA (Opprett gruppe)

dataSource.note: Attempts API fetch, falls back to hardcoded mock data on error

advancedFeatures.groupTypes: Supports WANG, Team Norway, Custom groups with different badges
advancedFeatures.memberPreview: Stacked avatar preview showing first 4 members
advancedFeatures.dropdownMenu: Inline action menu per group (edit, manage members, training plan, delete)
advancedFeatures.uniquePlayerCount: Calculates unique players across all groups
advancedFeatures.relativeTime: Smart next session formatting (today, tomorrow, in X days)

overallAssessment: GOOD - Professional group management with inline actions, needs to remove mock fallback and add success feedback
